zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Woodbridge於1614年出生在英國維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁時，他的父親Reverend John Woodbridge V32歲，母親Sarah Parker31歲。他於1639年5月20日與Mercy Dudley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1688年住在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波利。他於1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福被列為minister, ordained。他去世於1696年3月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年82歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend John Woodbridge于1614年出生在英国維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁时，他的父亲Reverend John Woodbridge V32岁，母亲Sarah Parker31岁。他于1639年5月20日与Mercy Dudley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1688年住在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波利。他于1647年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福被列为minister, ordained。他去世于1696年3月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年82岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Woodbridge was born in 1614, in Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England, his father, Reverend John Woodbridge V, was 32 and his mother, Sarah Parker, was 31. He married Mercy Dudley on 20 May 1639, in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States in 1688. In 1647, at the age of 33, his occupation is listed as minister, ordained in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 17 March 1696, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Woodbridge est né en 1614, à Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Reverend John Woodbridge V, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah Parker, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mercy Dudley le 20 mai 1639, à Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1688. En 1647, à l’âge de 33 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est minister, ordained à Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1696, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend John Woodbridge 1614 in Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reverend John Woodbridge V 32 und seine Mutter Sarah Parker 31. Er hat am 20. Mai 1639 in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mercy Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1688 hat er in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. 1647, als er 33 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als minister, ordained in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. März 1696 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Woodbridge è nato il nel 1614 nel Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Reverend John Woodbridge V, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Parker, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mercy Dudley il 20 maggio 1639, nel Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1688. Nel 1647, all'età di 33 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come minister, ordained nel Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 17 marzo 1696, nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridgeが1614年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン スト クインティンで生まれた時，父Reverend John Woodbridge Vは32歳，母Sarah Parkerは31歳であった。1639年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスアンドバーでMercy Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1688年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリーに住んでいた。1647年，33歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスアンドバーでの職業はminister, ordainedと記録されている。彼は1696年3月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで82歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridge(이)가 1614년 영국 윌츠히르 스탠턴 스트 퀸틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend John Woodbridge V(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Parker(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1639년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 앤도버에서 Mercy Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1688년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이에서 살았다. 1647년, 33세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 앤도버에서 minister, ordained이었다. 그는 1696년 3월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Woodbridge nasceu em 1614, em Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend John Woodbridge V, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Parker, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mercy Dudley em 20 de maio de 1639, em Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1688. Em 1647, com 33 anos, sua profissão aparece como minister, ordained em Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1696, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Woodbridge родился в 1614 г. в местности стантон ст куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Reverend John Woodbridge V было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Parker, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mercy Dudley 20 мая 1639 г. в местности андовир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности нюбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1688 году. В 1647 году, в возрасте 33 лет,  он работал по профессии minister, ordained в местности андовир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 17 марта 1696 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend John Woodbridge nació en 1614, en Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reverend John Woodbridge V, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sarah Parker, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mercy Dudley el 20 de mayo de 1639, en Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en Newbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1688. En 1647, a la edad de 33 años, su ocupación registrada era minister, ordained en Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1696, en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
